news.t: Pacer ETFs Kicks Off 2026 with Launch of Two New Quality Free Cash Flow-Focused ETFs, One International Growth Fund, and the Expansion of the Sales Management Team

holdings.infoBox: PIEL is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 15.08%, ASML Holding at 7.06%, Novartis AG at 4.43%, Roche Holding AG at 3.99%, and AstraZeneca at 3.78%.

overview.description: The Pacer International Export Leaders ETF (PIEL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer International Export Leaders index. The fund aims to track an index of large- and mid-cap companies located outside of the US with high foreign sales exposure. Holdings are weighted based on market capitalization. PIEL was launched on Dec 22, 2025 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Kicks Off 2026 with Launch of Two New Quality Free Cash Flow-Focused ETFs, One International Growth Fund, and the Expansion of the Sales Management Team
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $PIEL #ETF--Pacer ETFs kicks off 2026 with new free cash flow ETFs, international growth fund, after year of continued growth in 2025.
